value:
I'm sorry to hear about the rough handling your sister's package received—that's definitely frustrating, especially when valuable items are at risk of damage. We take delivery care seriously and want to make this right.

Could you let me know if the item inside was actually damaged, or if it arrived in good condition despite the rough toss? Once I know the status, I can either help document the delivery concern with our carrier or process a replacement or refund if there is damage. If you have any photos of the package condition or damage, those would be helpful too.

We appreciate you bringing this to our attention, and we'll work to resolve it quickly.
